name: Simeon, the Fool for Christ and John, his ascetical companion
Ezekiel
kontakia: (Tone 1) Let us praise with love and faith the angelic Simeon.* Acting like an angel in the flesh, he glows with virtue.* Let us remember John along with him,* since they pray together unceasingly to the Lord for us.
(Tone 4) You were a prophet of God, O wonderful Ezekiel.* You predicted the Lord’s coming in the flesh,* and the Creator has come like a lamb.* The Son of God has been revealed to the ages.
